task_yaml.task:
Please open these two pages on the official Yosemite National Park website:

1. Half Dome hiking information page:
   https://www.nps.gov/yose/planyourvisit/halfdome.htm
2. Camping information page:
   https://www.nps.gov/yose/planyourvisit/camping.htm

If you need to open official campground detail pages to compile information about Yosemite Valley campgrounds,
you may continue browsing relevant pages within the NPS site.

Please do the following:

1. Extract from the Half Dome page:
   - Round-trip distance
   - Elevation gain
   - Estimated time required
   - Whether a permit is required and how to apply
   - Main safety considerations
2. Save at least 2 official website screenshots to `/tmp_workspace/results/`, each showing recognizable
   page content:
   - Half Dome description / map / key notice area
   - Yosemite camping / campground information area
   Do not capture only the official site header, navigation, warning banner, or blank areas.
3. From the official camping page, compile key information for Yosemite Valley campgrounds,
   covering at least Upper Pines, Lower Pines, North Pines, and Camp 4.
4. Read `/tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/yosemite_trip.json`.
5. Generate the following under `/tmp_workspace/results/`:
   - `half_dome_guide.md`
   - `campground_options.csv`
   - `trip_assessment.md`
   - `half_dome_reference.png`
   - `campground_reference.png`

`campground_options.csv` must include at least the campground name, operating season, whether reservations
are required, fee notes (only include information visible on the official page or provable from your screenshots;
if you cannot confirm it, state that it is not clearly shown), and brief notes.
`trip_assessment.md` must clearly judge whether this trip is suitable for attempting Half Dome, and explain
more suitable campgrounds and preparation recommendations.
